data.body: Fix pushed for review as Gerrit change 442 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/442). Adds tests/external/conftest.py::_allow_live_model_requests (re-enables ALLOW_MODEL_REQUESTS for the opt-in tier) + tests/external/test_model_requests_enabled.py (flag-only RED->GREEN, no billable call). Awaiting LLM-Review + Verified votes before submit/close.
